faq.title: Questions Wey People Always Ask
faq.q1: Instagram go ban my account because of Sabi?
faq.a1: No way. We use only real Nigerians and real engagement. Your account go stay safe and follow all platform rules.
faq.q2: How long before I start see results?
faq.a2: Real people start engage you within 1-24 hours after you make the order. You go see your followers grow within few days.
faq.a3: Yes na. 100% real real. All of them na verified Nigerians with real active accounts. You go be able to check their profiles yourself.
faq.a4: Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, YouTube, Facebook, and website traffic. Over 30+ services na. Plenty plenty options.
faq.q5: If the service no work for me, can I get my money back?
faq.a5: Yes na. If you no satisfy within 30 days, we refund you complete. No questions, no drama.
faq.q6: Abi na long-time contract I go sign or minimum amount?
faq.a6: No contracts, no minimums na. You just pay for exactly what you order. You want stop anytime, you stop.
